ocr_findings.description: OCR renders 'もう少しだけたいい方をすると' — image reads 'もう少しだけたい言い方をすると'; the word 'たい言い方' is split oddly but reading is still understandable in context.

reviewer_notes: Page covers SLCPはどっち? sidebar and 共通フレーム main section (image shows page number 199). All key definitions, the IPA attribution, and the 共通フレーム2013 reference are accurately captured. Minor character-run issue in one phrase but does not change meaning materially.
